characters.name: Abandoned Jerrys
characters.description: Abandoned JerrysBiographical InformationAKAShaved Head JerryTank Top-Wearing JerryGoatee JerrySTATUSAliveAFFILIATIONJerryboreePLACE OF ORIGINEarth (various dimensions)Meta InformationFIRST SEEN INMortynight RunVOICE ACTORChris ParnellTheAbandonedJerrysare a group of Jerrys who reside in theJerryboreebecause their Ricks and Mortys never returned to pick them up. They live in a backroom, away from the Jerrys who only stay at Jerryboree temporarily. They were placed in the daycare center by their respective Ricks and Mortys, so they could go on adventures unencumbered. However, the Ricks and Mortys of the Abandoned Jerrys never returned, leaving the Jerrys stranded in the daycare centre. They received a new temporary member inJerry Smith, with whom they played cards. He came up with an idea to escape the daycare, to which they stated that no one inJerryboreeis kept against their will. When Jerry asked them why they chose to remain in the daycare, they answered with the same reason he himself was still there; because "they're Jerrys", coupled with the fact that the world outside the building is comparatively unknown and potentially hostile.

characters.name: Abrodolph Lincoler
characters.description: Abrodolph LincolerBiographical InformationSPECIESHuman (Composite Clone)AGEUnknown, possibly late 40's - early 50's (Biologically)STATUSUnknownHOME PLANETEarth 36FAMILYRick Sanchez(creator)Abraham Lincoln(genetic template)Adolf Hitler(genetic template)Meta InformationFIRST SEEN INRicksy BusinessVOICE ACTORMaurice LaMarche Abrodolph Lincoleris a genetically engineered human clone who debuted in "Ricksy Business". He was created byRickby combining the DNA ofAbraham LincolnandAdolf Hitlerin an attempt to create a morally neutral super leader. He failed and the end result was a cognitively dissonant and morally confused emotional train wreck. Abrodolph Lincoler appears at a party Rick andSummerhosted, seeking revenge against his creator. During a rant directed at Rick, he accidentally antagonizesBrad, who becomes hostile after Lincoler talks down to him. Since Brad is black, Lincoler inappropriately tries to appease him by pointing out he is half Abraham Lincoln. This only enrages Brad further and he subsequently beats Lincoler up after Rick and the other partygoers egg him on. Abrodolph Lincoler is described as a crazed maniac, who is a cognitively dissonant and morally confused emotional train wreck. He speaks at length about the duality of his existence. However, he is shown to be inept at navigating tense social situations, as seen when he antagonized Brad. Lincoler attempted to defuse the situation by pointing out he was half Abraham Lincoln. He also tried to look for Rick for help during the confrontation, but was quickly shut down. While he initially appears to be a tough foe, he is easily beat up byBrad, later though being able to fight off a beast somehow. It can be deduced that this was due to his guard being down, or that he didn't want the party-goers to think that he was indeed a racist by fighting back against Brad. His personal views are a hodgepodge of Lincoln's and Hitler's. For example, while he believes in the emancipation of African-Americans, he also believes in the eradication of 'inferior genes'. He is neither entirely evil nor good. Lincoler also occasionally uses German words mixed with English when talking, since Adolf Hitler was a German politician.

characters.name: Adam
characters.description: Adamis a Narnian appearing in the episode "Mort Dinner Rick Andre" as the main antagonist alongside his ancestors and descendants.AdamBiographical InformationSPECIESNarnianAGEYoung adultSTATUSDeceasedOCCUPATIONSoldierPLACE OF ORIGINNarnia DimensionFAMILYUnnamed motherMultiple unnamed ancestors and descendantsMeta InformationONLY APPEARANCEMort Dinner Rick Andre Multiple unnamed ancestors and descendants Adam was a young child before being forced into training by his Mother, he fought several holograms of Morty until he was ready, he was sent to theC-131 dimensionthrough a portal to kill Morty, while trying to kill him, he shoots a hole through the wall assassinatingMr. Nimbus'soctopus and looking confused, Jessica later stabs a tube connecting to Adam. He see's a hallucination of his Mother as a type of bird before subsequently being pulled back intoNarniaand dying.

characters.name: Adjudicator Rick
characters.description: Adjudicator RickBiographical InformationSPECIESHumanAGE70STATUSDeceasedOCCUPATIONAdjudicator for the electionMeta InformationAPPEARANCESThe Ricklantis Mixup Adjudicator Rickwas the adjudicator at the first presidential debate atThe Citadel. Adjudicator Rick had combed grey-blue hair and unibrow. He was tall and lanky, like most Ricks, with bags under his eyes. He wore a navy blue suit with a red and maroon striped tie, and a light blue shirt.

characters.name: Adult Morty (Rickmurai Jack)
characters.description: Adult MortyBiographical InformationSPECIESHumanSTATUSDeceasedMeta InformationONLY APPEARANCERickmurai JackVOICE ACTORJustin RoilandAdult Mortyis a twenty-six year old version ofMortywho appears in the episode "Rickmurai Jack". Adult Morty is an older version of his younger self who has a taller body, brown combover hair, facial hair, and a dark yellow shirt. He also wears dark blue jeans and has a tattoo on his left arm. After Morty aged himself into a 40 year old man to convinceRickto come back to theSmith Residence, Rick took him tothe Citadelto turn him back to normal. In the process, Adult Morty is created when subtracted from Morty's age as he notices aHunchback Mortyfighting aPolice Mortyin the street. After trying to break up the fight, another police Morty shoots and kills him. During his death, Adult Morty mentions how he does not want to sell out and wanted to be a famous online influencer.

characters.description: Afro RickBiographical InformationAKABlack RickSPECIESHumanAGE70STATUSAliveAFFILIATIONThe CitadelPLACE OF ORIGINEarth(Dimension E-33)FAMILYAfro Morty (grandson)Meta InformationFIRST SEEN INThe Rickshank RickdemptionAfro Rickis an alternate version ofRick Sanchezwith an afro, and of African-American descent. He was talking toAlien Rickand an unnamed Rick. Afro Rick with black hair inThe Rickshank Rickdemption

characters.name: Agent Gribbles
characters.description: Agent GribblesBiographical InformationSPECIESGromflomite(presumably)OCCUPATIONSpecial AgentAFFILIATIONGalactic Federation(formerly)Meta InformationFIRST SEEN INThe Wedding SquanchersVOICE ACTORNolan North Special Agent Gribblesworked for the Galactic Federation, heading the investigations ofRick Sanchez. Rick called him, posing asJerry Smith, to tell the federation where he would be, as well as to get his family sent back toEarth. Gribbles is told that Rick is headed for thePlim Plom Tavern, which is where the Galactic Federation apprehends him later on.

characters.name: Alan Rails
characters.description: Alan RailsBiographical InformationSPECIESHumanAGEUnknown, possibly late 40's - early 50'sSTATUSDeceasedOCCUPATIONMember of The VindicatorsAFFILIATIONThe VindicatorsFAMILYUnnamed Parents (deceased)Supernova(ex-wife)RELATIONSHIPSSupernova(ex-wife)Meta InformationFIRST SEEN INVindicators 3: The Return of WorldenderVOICE ACTORLance ReddickAlan Railswas a superhero who appeared inVindicators 3: The Return of Worldenderas a member ofThe Vindicators. His parents's tragic death in a railroad accident caused him to gain the ability to summon ghost trains. He was alsoSupernova's ex-husband, the couple divorced sometime in the past, possibly due to her affair and the strains of keeping their secrets. His death was caused byMillion Ants, when a fight started of his and Supernova's affair.  Though Supernova separated them, she didn't stop her lover from killing him. Alan Rails was a large muscular black man who wears an old-fashioned train conductor's cap with matching overalls, gloves, and a dirty, sleeveless greatcoat. The glowing green chain and train whistle around his neck allows him to summon ghost trains, which are capable of tunneling through solid rock. He is said to have a "tragedy-stricken half-ghost, half-tumescent penis." As a child, he owned a model train set, and his father bought him a locomotive toy car every time he traveled for work. His parents were tragically killed by a train some point later, and by then, he had over 100 toy cars. Alan Rails, being a member of the Vindicators, was a heroic man who protects planets and galaxies from the wrath of super-villains. However, Alan is shown to be very prideful and becomes annoyed with Rick's condescending behavior. He was the most prone to anger out of the Vindicators, as seen when he grabs Rick's collar. His personality is better explored in the spinoff series The Vindicators 2. In it, its shown sometime after his wife's affair with Million Ants, she told Alan the child was his. Something he was extremely happy about, he was also protective of her due to her condition. When Doom-Nomitron first appeared, he didn't want Supernova to fight out of fear the child and herself would get hurt. Save for loving to use his trains too much, Alan was shown to be a caring and loving husband. He was looking forward to being a father.  Despite his wife's insistence they fight, he and the team voted to help other planets while Rick handled Doom-Nomitron. It is also shown that he becomes somewhat strain and broken after the events caused by his wife. Though he was still loyal to her after she caused Dorian 5's destruction and their teammates murders, he felt their days of being a heroes were over. This leaves him feel tired of the disillusionment. He talks of how he wanted to be a different and hopefully better parent for the child, travel the universe together so his child would never feel alone. When his wife tries to comfort him saying they could try again. He heartbreakingly admits he doesn't have "enough c

When his wife tries to comfort him saying they could try again. He heartbreaking

He appeared in theRick and MortyepisodeA Rickle in Timeand is based on thereal-life scientist of the same name.

characters.name: Alexander
characters.description: AlexanderBiographical InformationAKADippity DooSPECIESHumanAGEUnknown, possibly late 40's - early 50'sSTATUSDeceasedOCCUPATIONMascot atAnatomy ParkMeta InformationFIRST SEEN INAnatomy ParkVOICE ACTORRob SchrabAlexanderis a character who appeared in the episodeAnatomy Park. He is a member of the team. Alexander was a minor character who was killed off very soon after he was introduced. His only known trait is that he has to wear a dog costume that he hates all the time andDr. Xenon Bloomwon't allow him to take it off. Alexander was a part of the team that worked onAnatomy Park, which was a theme park built inside the body of a homeless man namedRuben. He was hired by Dr. Bloom to be the theme park's mascot, something Alexander came to hate as he hated the costume and Bloom refused to allow him to take it off. WhenPonchoopened fire within the lungs section of the park, Ruben begins violently coughing as the gunfire shot up the alveoli. Alexander ends up getting lifted by the vacuum and is briefly saved byMorty, who, as he holds onto him, promises he won't die and asks for his name. Just as Alexander was about to share it, Reuben let out a violent cough and Alexander is pulled away from Morty's grasp. The sheer pressure of the vacuum causes Alexander's body to be ripped to pieces before being being coughed ontoRick's face.

characters.name: Alien Elle
characters.description: Alien ElleBiographical InformationSPECIESAlienSTATUSAliveMeta InformationVOICE ACTORHitomi Sasaki(Japanese)Luci Christian(English)Alien Elleis an alternate version ofEllewho worked withSpace Mortyto battle theGalactic Federationwho appears inRick and Morty: The Anime. Alien Elle is a tall teenage girl with light green skin, long blonde hair, and red oval eyes. She wears a pink armored chest plate, grey arm gauntlets, a black belt, pink pants, and long grey boots.

characters.name: Alien Gangsters
characters.description: Alien GangstersTypeDealersStatusDissolvedNotable MembersNargles(deceased)Only Appearance[[The Vat of Acid Episode]] The unnamedAlien Gangstersare a group of intergalactic dealers who appears in the episode "The Vat of Acid Episode". The alien gangsters are first seen whenRickandMortymeet them within a factory to trade gems. They then tell Rick that they gave them fake gems and scammed him. Rick kills one of them and then jumps into avat of fake acidwith Morty. They try to trick the alien gangsters that they died by opening hatches of bones. The alien gangsters are extremely shocked that a grandfather would commit suicide with his grandson and take time to process their deaths, self-reflection of the experience, and investigating their bones. Morty then emerges out of the vat and misfires at the gangsters until Rick kills them all and leaves.

The alien gangsters are first seen whenRickandMortymeet them within a factory to trade gems. They then tell Rick that they gave them fake gems and scammed him. Rick kills one of them and then jumps into avat of fake acidwith Morty. They try to trick the alien gangsters that they died by opening hatches of bones. The alien gangsters are extremely shocked that a grandfather would commit suicide with his grandson and take time to process their deaths, self-reflection of the experience, and investigating their bones. Morty then emerges out of the vat and misfires at the gangsters until Rick kills them all and leaves.

characters.name: Alien Googah
characters.description: TheAlien Googahis an alien creature that invaded The Sex Tunnels ofThe White Housein "The Rickchurian Mortydate". The Googah is actually quite small in size, and poses no real threat to anyone. In "The Rickchurian Mortydate", The Alien Googah somehow made its was intoThe White House, where it hid out in The John F. Kennedy Sex Tunnels. A janitor came across the alien and alertedThe President. The President, concerned, contactedRickandMorty, seeing them as the only ones fit to defeat it. When explaining the problem to Rick and Morty, The President didn't know what the creature was called, so he just made up the word "Alien Googah" for it. Rick and Morty went into the sex tunnels to find the alien and when they did, it turned out it was insultingly small in size. Rick shot it a few times and it cowered back into a hole it chewed in the wall. Rick and Morty decided the alien was completely harmless and that The President was wasting their time, by making them fight it, so they just left the scene, and decided to play Minecraft instead.

characters.name: Alien Morty
characters.description: Alien MortyBiographical InformationAKAAlien MortySPECIESHumanAGE14STATUSUnknownAFFILIATIONAlien RickThe CitadelPLACE OF ORIGINUnknown dimension in the multiverseFAMILYAlien Rick(maternal grandfather)Meta InformationFIRST SEEN IN[[Close Rick-counters of the Rick Kind]]Alien Mortyis an alternate version ofMorty Smithwho appeared in the episodeClose Rick-Counters of the Rick Kind. Alien Morty is an alien teenage boy. He has slimy, lime-green skin. He has two curlyantennaeon his head and short brown hair. He has three slightly squinty eyes, with one of them on his forehead and he also has a big nose. He has pointed elf-like ears, He wears a yellow shirt and blue pants, and has 4 arms.

characters.name: Alphabetrians
characters.description: AlphabetriansTypeLetter-shaped humanoid aliensStatusExtantNotable membersMagma-Q(one of the leaders)Magnesium-J(one of the leaders)Hydrogen-F(one of the leaders)Magma-T(current leader)Sulfur-POxygen-S(false representative of the species)Titanium D(one of the NewVindicators)HomeworldAlphabetriumAffiliationNumbericons(enemies, formerly)First AppearanceGet SchwiftyTheAlphabetriansare a race of aliens who resemble giant letters. Some of them represent different materials. (For example:Water-T- Water,Magma-Q- Magma.) They appeared in the episode "Get Schwifty". The Alphabetrians are rivals with theNumbericons, and in this episode, they were in a war with them. They were defending their planet during the invasion from theNumbericons.Water-Twent up against theNumbericonsand jumped out into the army and started shooting all of them up. AfterMagma-T,Sinistar-7,Mr. Goldenfold,Sulfur-PandMorty PrimedefeatedInfinity, the Alphabetrians began to live onAlphabetriumwithNumbericons.

characters.name: Alyson Hannigan
characters.description: Alyson HanniganBiographical InformationSPECIESUnknownSTATUSDeceasedOCCUPATIONPublic DefenderMeta InformationAPPEARANCESAmortycan GrickfittiVOICE ACTORKari Wahlgren Alyson Hanniganwas an alien public defender who appeared in the episodeAmortycan Grickfitti. Alyson was assigned to defendMorty,Summer, andBruce Chutbackafter they were accused of reckless driving and manslaughter. However,Rick's shipkilled her before she arrived and reanimated her body via a control chip. Rick's car urged Morty and Summer to let Bruce take the fall for the crimes, but when they refused the car detonated the chip in Alyson's head, allowing the car to rescue them from the prison.

characters.name: Amfiddians
characters.description: AmfiddiansTypeAmphibian humanoidStatusAliveHomeworldAmfiddiaAffiliationGalactic FederationFirst AppearanceMortynight RunAmfiddians[1]are large, 3-eyed, fish-like beings that hail from the planetAmfiddia. Amfiddians have a distinct fish-like appearance with a notable dorsal fin on the back of their head, three eyes, short height, and fin-like hands and feet. They have scaly skin, mainly seen in murky green and red color. They wear both pants and jackets/vests, but not shoes. An Amfiddian was playing an arcade game atBlips and ChitzwhileMortywas playingRoy: A Life Well Lived, in "Mortynight Run".

characters.name: Amish Cyborg
characters.description: Amish CyborgBiographical InformationSPECIESMemory ParasiteSTATUSDeceasedMeta InformationONLY APPEARANCETotal RickallAmish Cyborgwas a fake persona taken by anMemory Parasite. He appeared in the episodeTotal Rickall. He was shot and killed by Rick while fleeing from him in the kitchen. Amish Cyborg is an old, Amish man with a big black beard and sideburns who wears a black hat, a white shirt, brown jeans, held up by suspenders, and black shoes. He has one robotic leg and an arm, the latter having the head of a shovel at the end. Half of his face is also robotic, with two red circular lights in the place of his eye, and a robotic cover over his mouth, with green lights on it that go up and down when he talks. He is often referred to as Hamborg by his close friendHamurai. A silly and nonsensical character. In his case, making an Amish man into a cyborg, when the Amish are a community known for refusing the conveniences of modern technology, is essentially an oxymoron in itself. A silly and nonsensical character. In his case, making an Amish man into a cyborg, when the Amish are a community known for refusing the conveniences of modern technology, is essentially an oxymoron in itself.
characters.personality_section: A silly and nonsensical character. In his case, making an Amish man into a cyborg, when the Amish are a community known for refusing the conveniences of modern technology, is essentially an oxymoron in itself.

characters.name: Anderson Cooper
characters.description: Anderson CooperBiographical InformationSPECIESHumanSTATUSAliveOCCUPATIONJournalistMeta InformationONLY APPEARANCE[[JuRicksic Mort]]Anderson Cooperis a broadcast journalist and political commentator who appears in the episode "JuRicksic Mort". Anderson Cooper is seen when thedinosaursguest on his showAnderson Cooper 360and questioning them if they have a plan to stop themeteorsfrom impactingEarth. When the dinosaurs mention that they are finding a situation that does not involve violence, Anderson Cooper angrily replies with how the dinosaurs are weighing whether to let the meteors slam their planet and kill everyone on it.

characters.name: Andre Curtis
characters.description: Andre CurtisBiographical InformationAKAThe PresidentPresident ObamaSPECIESHumanHivemind (Formerly)AGE61STATUSDeceased (Prime Dimension)[1]Deceased (Dimension C-131)Alive (Parmesan Dimension)OCCUPATIONPresident of the United StatesPLACE OF ORIGINEarth (Dimension C-131/Parmesan Dimension)RELATIONSHIPSGeneral Nathan(ex-colleague; deceased)Meta InformationFIRST SEEN INGet SchwiftyVOICE ACTORKeith David President Obama Hivemind (Formerly) President Curtis is shown to be a domineering, sexist and very haughty authoritative figure. He holds the United States (which he considers the entire world) and his presidency in the highest regard and believes that "the office of the President can't co-exist with a living god that won't submit to it," these beliefs would later clash with Rick and Morty's autonomous nature. When the President learns that Rick and Morty are annoyed with his incessant demands for aid, and is casually told by them that when they save the world the United States just happens to be saved too, he is angered and outright begins to antagonize the two, trying and miserably failing to prove that the United States doesn't need them. This finally stops when the President falls for Rick's ruse as "Fly Fishing Rick," an alternate dimension version of Rick who feigns obedience and compliance to him while promising to undo the damage that the "other Rick" caused. This also shows that the President is somewhat gullible, as he never once questions the possibility of Fly Fishing Rick being Rick in an obvious disguise.

He holds the United States (which he considers the entire world) and his presidency in the highest regard and believes that "the office of the President can't co-exist with a living god that won't submit to it," these beliefs would later clash with Rick and Morty's autonomous nature. When the President learns that Rick and Morty are annoyed with his incessant demands for aid, and is casually told by them that when they save the world the United States just happens to be saved too, he is angered and outright begins to antagonize the two, trying and miserably failing to prove that the United States doesn't need them. This finally stops when the President falls for Rick's ruse as "Fly Fishing Rick," an alternate dimension version of Rick who feigns obedience and compliance to him while promising to undo the damage that the "other Rick" caused. This also shows that the President is somewhat gullible, as he never once questions the possibility of Fly Fishing Rick being Rick in an obvious disguise.

characters.name: Andy
characters.description: AndyBiographical InformationSPECIESHumanSTATUSDeceasedOCCUPATIONMascotMeta InformationONLY APPEARANCERickmurai JackVOICE ACTORJustin RoilandAndyis the mascot ofthe Citadelwho appears in the episode "Rickmurai Jack". Andy is first seen whenRickandMortyenter the Citadel in order to fix Morty's age after the former takes an aging potion as he introduces him as the Citadel's new mascot. He then mentions how the place would not be home without Ricks "Andy" Morties. Rick and Morty then walk away from him with the latter calling him and his pun dumb. Andy's corpse can be seen in "The Rick, The Mort & The Ugly" when Rick and Morty are collecting scraps in space using theSpace Cruiser.
